name: fh-editor-vendor
description: Bundles CodeMirror 6 + @codemirror/lsp-client + the Pkl Lezer parser (generated from pkl.grammar) into a single self-contained vendor.js for the dashboard editor. Run `npm install && npm run build` when the deps or grammar change; vendor.js and the generated pkl.parser*.js are gitignored (CI rebuilds them), so the app needs no CDN or import map.
